decisions.question: How should session discovery be restructured to scan all local sessions globally rather than per-repo?
decisions.chosen: Remove repo-id scoping entirely; flat ~/.koto/sessions/<session>/ namespace with one-time migration helper

decisions.question: How should koto session update --intent safely mutate a state file header while the koto engine may be running concurrently?
decisions.chosen: Append IntentUpdated event to JSONL log; derive intent from last such event at read time

decisions.question: How should the detail pane load data when it is always visible in the horizontal split layout, given the 200ms refresh budget?
decisions.chosen: Tick-based load with mtime guard on focused session; two new fields on DashboardAppState

cross_validation_note: Integration constraint resolved: D2 (intent in JSONL) + D3 (mtime-guarded loads) compose by extending the mtime guard in refresh() to re-derive JSONL-based fields for all sessions when mtime changes. No decision restart required.
